reviews.review_description: The players are really nice and if they are using fly or any other mods the modderators politely ask them to stop and they listen!!! Game has high potential and is really good, REMEMBER FOREST GUIDE TTTCOOL
This game has free mods loads of staff and nice people
When I was just playing, somebody was trying to figure out my password he had a blue beanie with Rosie cheeks ￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks for reporting this we take situations like this seriously. We’ve reviewed the player and taken action.

Just to reassure you, no one can access your password through the game, but if anyone is making you uncomfortable, please report them right away. We appreciate you letting us know!”
